notes: Either male or female animals of the flock or herd could be used for the peace offering. The name of this offering in Hebrew is shelamim, which is related to the noun shalom ("peace") and the verb shalam ("to be entire, sound, safe, at peace"). As indicated later (Lev. 7:11-21), the peace offering could be used for giving thanks, making or concluding a vow, or for making other supplications. Only the fat was burned;
